narratives.opening: Operator, you have entered the Systems Console. This interface grants visibility into your local environment. Use it to restore sync, validate integrity, and maintain operational clarity.
narratives.complete_pass: All systems nominal. Proceed with confidence.
narratives.repair_confirm: Confirm repair action? This operation will modify local state.
narratives.repair_complete: System state recalibrated. Operational clarity restored.
narratives.repair_failed: Repair sequence incomplete. Manual intervention may be required.
